title: ilex nitida f. typica
intro: Ilex nitida f. typica, also known as the glossy-leaf holly, is a plant species within the Ilex genus characterized by its glossy, dark green leaves and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Ilex nitida f. typica include reducing fever, relieving headaches and pain, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the berries to make a tincture, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
